response.reasoning: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack experience, well beyond the 6+ year requirement. Strong TypeScript/Node.js background from Optilyz, RIDE Capital, and current role at re:cinq. Current role explicitly mentions AI-agent infrastructure and MCP work, matching the AI agent development requirement. React experience at Optilyz. MongoDB and SQL listed. Docker experience confirmed. Java experience from Altom Consulting matches secondary stack. TDD/testing focus is strong (Fluent-Asserts, Trial, Selenium course, workshops). Concerns: no explicit Nest.js mention, no explicit Vitest mention (though Jest-equivalent testing expertise is clear), no explicit Kotlin (Java only), no explicit cloud platform beyond AWS CDK mention at Optilyz, no PostgreSQL explicitly listed. Heavy DLang background may not be directly relevant but shows polyglot capability. Strong workshops/teaching background indicates communication skills.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack with TypeScript/Node.js/React matching primary stack
Current AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work directly matches AI requirement
Strong TDD/testing culture with own test frameworks and workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed

response.justification: Candidate exceeds the experience requirement and hits the core TypeScript/Node.js/React stack with directly relevant AI-agent/MCP work at re:cinq. Testing rigor is exceptional. Gaps in Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin are real but learnable for a senior polyglot with this trajectory. Strong interview signal.
